games.title: Amnesia: The Bunker
games.description: Amnesia: The Bunker is a first-person horror game set in a WW1 bunker. A relentless, AI-driven monster stalks you. Survival depends on finding tools, crafting items, and keeping the lights on. Steam reviews: 94% positive (Very Positive).

games.title: Bad North: Jotunn Edition
games.description: Bad North is a charming but brutal real-time tactics roguelite. Command your loyal subjects to take full tactical advantage of the unique shape of each island. Steam reviews: 93.1% positive (Very Positive).

games.title: Cuphead
games.description: Cuphead is a classic run and gun action game heavily focused on boss battles. Inspired by cartoons of the 1930s, the visuals and audio are painstakingly created with the same techniques of the era, i.e. traditional hand drawn cel animation, watercolor backgrounds, and original jazz recordings. Steam reviews: 96.1% positive (Overwhelmingly Positive).
